turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello. I want to book a sleep study. I snore heavily and my wife says I stop breathing sometimes at night.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: That sounds like it could be sleep apnoea, and it's important to get it checked. We do have a sleep lab. Your name and number?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you Rajendra ji. The sleep study is an overnight procedure — you'd come in the evening and leave by morning. Next available date is next Saturday. Convenient?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Saturday works perfectly. What time do I come?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Please arrive at 9 PM. The study runs through the night and you'll be done by 6 AM. Booked for Rajendra Bhatt next Saturday. SMS confirmation follows.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Just comfortable sleeping clothes and your regular medications if any. Avoid caffeine the day of the study.
